shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "git status --short && sed -n '1,240p' AGENTS.md && printf '\\n--- day refs ---\\n' && rg -n \"in-selecting-range|selecting|month|outside|preSelected|isIn\" src/day.tsx src/month.tsx src/calendar.tsx src/test/day_test.test.tsx src/test/multi_month_test.test.tsx"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "react-datepicker selectsRange multi-month filler day in-selecting-range highlight" --json --top-k 5'
/bin/bash -lc 'node_modules/.bin/prettier --check src/day.tsx && git diff --check && git diff -- src/day.tsx'

/bin/bash -lc 'mkdir -p "$HOME/.mempal-notes" && cat > "$HOME/.mempal-notes/react-datepicker-range-preview-month-grid.md" <<'"'EOF'
# Keep range previews local to the displayed month

Month grids render adjacent-month dates as filler cells, so day-level selecting-range logic must reject dates identified as outside the displayed month before applying preview classes. Reusing the day component's existing adjacent-month predicates also keeps derived preview boundary classes from leaking onto filler cells while preserving standalone day behavior when no month context is supplied.
EOF
mempal ingest \""'$HOME/.mempal-notes" --wing memory-evals'

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
